who: risk managers in accounting firms processing 5–15 clients/month
offer: For risk managers in accounting firms processing 5–15 clients/month, inadequate threat cataloging causes increased risk exposure. We provide a centralized platform instead of manual spreadsheets and disparate tools.
problem: Inadequate threat cataloging and control management leads to increased risk exposure.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for risk management discussions
Engage in Indie Hackers conversations about similar tools
DM risk managers with a demo video of the platform
Share insights in community forums for risk managers
try_it: Let users try threat cataloging and control management on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a simple landing page with a clear CTA
Produce a short demo video of the platform
Conduct 10 interviews with target users for feedback
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Update community weekly on progress and features
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as templates for quick access
Set default reminders for tracking tasks
Enable CSV import for existing threat data
